subcodes.first_line: O precious souls! Your letter was received, and from its contents the utmost joy was obtained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس نفیسه نامه شما رسید و از مضمون نهایت شادمانی حاصل گردید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @past, present and future of Iran, @poems and quotation from poetry
